name: gpt-5-6-swarm
description: Bounded, fail-closed multi-agent orchestration for Codex.

interface.longDescription: An independent community derivative that plans Codex work as a coordinator-owned graph, runs eligible agents concurrently, and reconciles results through evidence-backed gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $gpt-5-6-swarm to orchestrate this task with bounded parallel agents.
Design a safe Swarm graph for this repository task.
Review this Swarm run for ambiguity, drift, and missing evidence.
